Table of Contents

Interface ICompositeXform

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control a collection of geodata transform.

[Guid("17AC03FF-547D-4714-AF19-C474E1F1C153")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface ICompositeXform : IGeodataXform

Properties

Count

The geodata transform count of the collection.

int Count { get; }

Property Value

int
